allow: Bash(rm -rf server website keys license-manager.js SETUP_PAYMENTS.md)

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 4242,5500\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Stopped PID $_ on port $p" } catch { "Could not stop PID $_ on port $p" } } } else { "Nothing listening on $p" } })
